title: Pickle PVP
description: PVP Tweaks that keeps your world vanilla while also adding a PVP/CPVP twist making it great for PVP and Anarchy servers
body:
A **simple** PVP pack that keeps your game mostly vanila but also adds some simple tweeks for PVP/CPVP this is useful for playing on servers that have CPVP or just PVP like MCPVP, PVP Legacy, 2b2t ETC.

Fetures:
- green outline for all ores 
- re-textured end crystal with a smily face in the center
- simpler in-hand armor items
- no pumpken blur
- shorter swords
- re-textured ender pearl
- pickle totem with eyes
- lower fire
- no explotions
- simple bedrock
- simple obsidian
- simple crying obsidian

If you have feedback about this texture pack, you may input the feedback here:   https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeUqnNS0E87v5372d_9lnC4eRbqO1PmT9d-7k6RcUxME7Y1qg/viewform?usp=header
